raw_transcript_text:
DOCTOR: Namaste, kya problem hai? aapko saans lene mein dikkat hai?

PATIENT: Ji haan, saans phool rahi hai, aur khansi bhi ho rahi hai.

DOCTOR: Theek hai. Aapke kitne dinon se problem hai? Pichhle hafte se?

PATIENT: Haan, haan. Pichhle 5-6 din se aur baar baar ho rahi hai. Pehle bhi hoti thi, par ab zyada ho gayi.

DOCTOR: Chalo, pehle kuch basic leta hoon. Apna BP aur pulse check karte hain... BP theek hai, 128/82. Pulse 92 hai. SpO2 kitna hai? Oxygen 97 hai. Temperature bhi normal hai, 98.4. Ab aap batao, khansi mein kya nikalta hai? Sukhi khansi hai ya balgam aata hai?

PATIENT: Balgam aata hai, doctor sahab. Peela aur gaadha.

DOCTOR: Hmm. To infection ka bhi chance hai. Kya aap pichhle kuch dinon mein dawai le rahe the? Ya koi pichle prescription hai?

PATIENT: Haan, pehle kuch dawaiyaan theen. Glycomet kha raha tha, par ab band kar diya. Aur haan, Ecosprin aur Telma-40 bhi le raha tha.

DOCTOR: Ecosprin aur Telma-40? To aap hypertension aur diabetes ke patient hain? Theek hai, hum aapka pura record dekhte hain. Kya aapko smoking ya koi aur addiction hai?

PATIENT: Paan karta hoon, doctor sahab. Pichhle 20 saal se.

DOCTOR: Theek hai, to COPD aur infection dono ka mila-jhul mamla hai. Aapko pehle bhi asthma ya COPD ki dawa mili thi? Koi puffer ya inhaler?

PATIENT: Nahi, kabhi nahi. Pehle bas khansi ki dawai le li thi.

DOCTOR: Okay, to ab hum kuch test karenge. Chest mein ghutti ki awaaz aa rahi hai, wheezing hai. Aapko oral steroids aur antibiotics deni padegi.

PATIENT: Sir, abhi toh dawai hi de do. Injection nahi chahiye.

DOCTOR: Koi baat nahi. Main aapko course likh deta hoon. Suniye:

- Augmentin 625mg, din mein do baar, khaane ke baad, 5 din ke liye.
- Azithral 500mg bhi ek tablet roz subah, do teen din?
Nahi, ek ka kaafi hai — sirf Augmentin de doonga.

- Ecosprin aur Telma-40 jaari rakhen.
- Khansi ke liye Dolo-650? Nahi, Dolo-650 nahi.
- Balgam patla karne ke liye Shelcal plus Dhaturo? Nahi, generic do.

Prescription:

1. **Inhaler** — Formoterol + Budesonide Rotacaps (Foracort 400 Rotacaps) ek rotacap din mein subah sham.
2. **Tablet** — Cefixime 200 + Clavulanic acid (Cefemax-CV) — khana khaane ke baad, 5 din.
3. **Tablet** — Pangest Plus / Pan-D — subah khaali pet.
4. **Tablet** — Shelcal — ek tablet raat ko.
5. **Injection** — Deriphyllin ki zaroorat nahi abhi.

Aur haan, do minute ka koi baat nahi. Aap ekg bhi karwa lo — phat-te nahi? Koi problem nahi.

PATIENT: Theek hai, doctor sahab. Aur kya karna hai?

DOCTOR: Baki sab theek hai. Aarogya se raho. Pani zyada piyo, dawai time se lo. Aur maasik review ke liye aana. Haan?

PATIENT: Haan, theek hai.

DOCTOR: Chalo, phir milte hain.

soap_note.subjective: Patient presents with shortness of breath and cough with thick yellow sputum for 5-6 days. History of similar episodes. Additional complaints: abdominal pain, fever. Past medical history: hypertension and diabetes. Medications: Ecosprin, Telma-40. Previously took Glycomet. Habit: betel leaf chewing for 20 years. No history of inhaler or asthma/COPD medications.
soap_note.objective: BP 128/82, Pulse 92, SpO2 97%, Temperature 98.4°F. Chest auscultation: wheezing. EKG: [VERIFY].
soap_note.assessment: Acute exacerbation of COPD with possible infection. Differential: asthma, pneumonia.
soap_note.plan: 1. Foracort 400 Rotacaps (Formoterol + Budesonide) one rotacap twice daily. 2. Cefemax-CV (Cefixime 200mg + Clavulanic acid) one tablet after food for 5 days. 3. Pan-D (Pantoprazole) one tablet empty stomach in morning. 4. Shelcal (calcium supplement) one tablet at night. 5. Continue Ecosprin and Telma-40. 6. Advise increased water intake, regular medication, and monthly follow-up.
